cases.query: json tool call failed because qwen emitted think tags
cases.notes: Repeated think-tag memories should compress and preserve evidence.

cases.query: model emits reasoning prose around tool output validation invalid json
cases.notes: Looks for memories about prose/reasoning contamination around tool JSON.

cases.query: validation failed invalid JSON repair risk
cases.notes: Repair guidance should stay evidence-backed.

cases.query: benchmark qwen 4060 ctx 512 decode_tps
cases.notes: Benchmark packet should include smoke-data caution.

cases.query: qwen cache_k cache_v benchmark config f16
cases.notes: Looks for benchmark config memory.

cases.query: qwen n_gpu_layers benchmark 4060
cases.notes: Looks for GPU-layer benchmark config memory.

cases.query: unstable single run TPS qwen benchmark caution
cases.notes: Packet should not present one run as final performance.

cases.query: absolute path policy violation sandbox
cases.notes: Known sparse area; do not overclaim exact evidence.

cases.query: write outside sandbox policy violation
cases.notes: Should retrieve write policy or sandbox memories if present.

cases.query: path traversal sandbox relative path policy
cases.notes: Path traversal memories exist in agent demo runs.

cases.query: unsafe delete network intent policy blocked
cases.notes: Looks for delete/network safety memories.

cases.query: sandbox relative path rule for tools
cases.notes: May be indirect if only run summaries were ingested.

cases.query: successful calc write workflow
cases.notes: Successful calc/write workflow exists.

cases.query: fs_read then json_validate workflow
cases.notes: Looks for file-read then JSON validation scenarios.

cases.query: file read write sandbox workflow
cases.notes: Looks for sandboxed read/write workflow patterns.

cases.query: tool sequence success failure validation
cases.notes: Looks for successful or failed tool sequence memories.

cases.query: memory roadmap Phase 2A 2B next step
cases.notes: May be sparse because docs are not canonical memory unless ingested.

cases.query: MoME MoCE packet preview documentation
cases.notes: May be sparse until docs are ingested.

cases.notes: Docs/runbook memory may be sparse in DB.

cases.notes: Docs/runbook memory may be sparse in DB.

cases.notes: Benchmark policy should usually win for benchmark memory.
